title: Moving to a New Home 搬家
scene: 一家人在打包东西准备搬家。

lines.en: Tom, please help me pack your books into this box.
lines.zh: 汤姆，请帮我把你的书装进这个箱子里。

lines.en: OK, Mom. Do I need to pack all of them?
lines.zh: 好的，妈妈。全部都要装吗？

lines.en: Pack the books you read often. The rest can go in a big box.
lines.zh: 常看的书装起来。剩下的放大箱子里。

lines.en: I am going to miss this room.
I know. But our new home has a bigger room for you.
lines.zh: 我知道。但我们新家给你准备了更大的房间。

lines.en: Really? Can I paint the walls blue?
lines.zh: 真的吗？我可以把墙刷成蓝色吗？

lines.en: We can talk about that. First, finish packing.
lines.zh: 这个可以商量。先把东西装好。

lines.en: Mom, what should I do with these old toys?
lines.zh: 妈妈，这些旧玩具怎么办？

lines.en: Keep the ones you like. We can give the rest away.
lines.zh: 喜欢的留下。其他的可以送人。

lines.en: I am excited about the new home now!
lines.zh: 我现在对新家很期待了！
